report.summary: Cycle-close v14: +4 pages built (layer-3-chains, mpc-wallets, onchain-identity-reputation, leveraged-tokens) and +4 slugs promoted in batches 15-16 since v13. Publish queue now EMPTY. 502 published slugs total, 103 still missing page.tsx. 46 TS errors unchanged. Deploy drift now 7 days — P0 blocker persists.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: PAGE AUDIT: 502 published slugs (up from ~481 in v13 due to batches 15-16 additions). 103 missing page.tsx files — same gap across /blog, /taxes, /investing/best, /wallets, /defi-lending sections. No new gaps introduced.
NEW PAGE.TSX FILES SINCE v13: 4 new files — leveraged-tokens-guide-2026, layer-3-chains-guide-2026, onchain-identity-reputation-guide-2026, mpc-wallets-guide-2026. All have backing code ready.
PUBLISH QUEUE DELTA: 4 items drained since v13 — depin-earning + btcfi-yield-strategies (batch 15), layer-3-chains + mpc-wallets (batch 16). Queue is now EMPTY.

TYPESCRIPT: 46 errors across 3 files — unchanged from v13. Files: crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped > chars), crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (same pattern), structured-data.examples.ts (syntax). Non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors.
NO NEW REGRESSIONS: No commits since Mar 17 (e999560). No code-level changes to introduce regressions.
NETWORK NOTE: Egress blocked — could not verify live HTTP status codes. Carrying forward prior verified data (homepage 200, H1 confirmed in v12).

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: EGRESS BLOCKED: Could not reach degen0x.com APIs this cycle. All 6 route statuses carried forward from v12 verified data.

CARRIED STATUS — /api/health: healthy (CoinGecko 65ms, cache 45ms, rate limit 1499/1500). /api/prices: Live BTC/ETH with sparklines. /api/fear-greed: Active (value 11, Extreme Fear at v12 check). /api/trending: CoinGecko trending coins. /api/market-dominance: BTC 56.36%, ETH 10.35%, total $2.46T.
STILL 404 IN PROD — /api/market-metrics: Route exists locally (src/app/api/market-metrics/route.ts, 5KB) but is uncommitted. Will resolve with next deploy. P1.
LOCAL API ROUTES: 16 API route directories confirmed under src/app/api/ — including market-metrics, defi-yields, newsletter, news-rss, notifications, standup-email, og, subscribe.
CACHE TTLs: Configured correctly — prices 60s, trending 300s, fear-greed 600s, market-dominance 300s. No local changes to cache config this cycle.
RATE LIMITING: Still missing on 6 core data routes — P1 carry-over from prior cycles.

sections.title: DevOps
items: DEPLOY DRIFT [P0]: 7 days since last code commit (e999560, Mar 17). All Vercel deploys since are redeploys of same snapshot.
UNCOMMITTED WORK: 48 files changed, 4,354 insertions, 3,464 deletions. 4 new page.tsx files this cycle alone.
CRITICAL UNCOMMITTED: published-pages.ts (+172 lines), middleware.ts, 20+ new page routes, /api/market-metrics route, smoke tests.
PRODUCTION GAP: ~160+ pages promoted locally since Mar 17 are invisible to production and Google crawlers. Includes all batches 1-16 of 2026-03-24.
EGRESS NOTE: Could not verify Vercel dashboard or live deployment status. Carrying forward v12 verified status: builds 'Ready'.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DELTA THIS CYCLE (v14 vs v13): +4 page.tsx files built (leveraged-tokens, layer-3-chains, onchain-identity-reputation, mpc-wallets). +4 slugs promoted in batches 15-16. Publish queue drained to EMPTY.
PUBLISH QUEUE: EMPTY — all items promoted. No pending queue items for next cycle.
ACTION REQUIRED [P0]: Commit and deploy. 7-day drift is #1 blocker. 48 changed files including 160+ promoted pages invisible to users and crawlers.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Fix /api/market-metrics 404 — route exists locally, just needs to be in the next commit/deploy.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Fix 46 TS errors in 3 files — unescaped > in JSX (2 learn pages) + syntax in structured-data.examples.ts.
ACTION REQUIRED [P2]: Scaffold 103 missing page.tsx files for published slugs across /blog, /taxes, /investing/best, /wallets, /defi-lending.
CARRY-OVER: Rate-limit 6 core API routes, build /trading hub, build /compare/exchanges hub, scaffold missing page.tsx files.
